typography.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-bold tracking-tight text-[#0F172A] leading-tight

layout_patterns.hero: Two-column mobile-first layout. Text on left, image on right (or top/bottom on mobile). Must include a floating trust badge ('5.0★ Google rating') overlapping the image.
layout_patterns.services_grid: 4-column grid on desktop, 2 on tablet, 1 on mobile (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4). Cards should have generous padding (p-8).
layout_patterns.why_us: Grid or flex layout emphasizing trust signals (20+ años de experiencia, Horario Lunes a Sábado, Atención Personalizada).
layout_patterns.about_doctor: Asymmetrical layout. Large portrait photo with subtle rounded corners overlapping a soft #FDFBF7 background block. Emphasize technology differentiator.
layout_patterns.gallery: Responsive grid or Shadcn carousel showing 4+ high-quality clinic interior images.
layout_patterns.pricing: 3-column grid for Nexo Sites plans teaser. Use subtle glassmorphism or soft borders to distinguish the 'Popular' plan.
layout_patterns.contact: Include embedded Google Maps (iframe), address, hours, and direct WhatsApp links.
layout_patterns.footer: Clean minimal footer with links, copyright, and Nexo Sites branding.

buttons.primary_whatsapp: bg-[#25D366] text-white hover:bg-[#1EBE5D] font-medium rounded-full px-8 py-4 transition-all duration-300 shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl hover:-translate-y-1 inline-flex items-center gap-2
buttons.secondary_blue: bg-[#1B6CA8] text-white hover:bg-[#155A8C] font-medium rounded-full px-8 py-4 transition-all duration-300 shadow-md hover:shadow-lg inline-flex items-center gap-2
buttons.outline: border-2 border-[#1B6CA8] text-[#1B6CA8] hover:bg-[#1B6CA8] hover:text-white rounded-full px-8 py-4 transition-all duration-300 inline-flex items-center gap-2

cards.service: bg-white p-8 rounded-2xl shadow-[0_4px_20px_rgba(0,0,0,0.03)] border border-slate-100 hover:shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgba(27,108,168,0.1)] hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all duration-300 group cursor-pointer h-full flex flex-col items-start
cards.pricing: bg-white p-8 rounded-3xl border border-slate-100 relative overflow-hidden flex flex-col

badges.trust: bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-md px-4 py-2 rounded-full shadow-lg border border-slate-100 flex items-center gap-2 font-medium text-sm text-slate-800

gallery.alt: Interior moderno de la clínica dental
Sala de espera de la clínica

animations.scroll_reveal: Use framer-motion for staggered fade-up (opacity 0 to 1, y: 20 to 0) as user scrolls down sections.
animations.hover_states: Micro-interactions on cards and buttons. Avoid heavy animations; keep it clinical and precise.

instructions_to_main_agent: No generic testimonial cards due to low review count. Use a '5.0★ en Google' trust badge in the Hero instead.
Implement a Sticky Floating WhatsApp button on bottom-right (visible only on mobile `md:hidden` or scaled appropriately).
All primary CTAs link to WhatsApp sales.
Use Lucide-react icons for services and UI elements.
Generate 8 services for the grid (e.g., Limpieza Dental, Ortodoncia, Implantes, Blanqueamiento, Endodoncia, Odontopediatría, Prótesis, Cirugía Oral).
Ensure the hero background is clean. If overlaying text on image, use proper text shadow or a gradient overlay.
Do NOT use Inter or Roboto for headings. Use Outfit (Google Fonts) for H1-H6, and Manrope for paragraphs.
Add `data-testid` to all interactive elements, e.g., `data-testid='hero-whatsapp-btn'`, `data-testid='service-card-1'`.
